name: Lee Jung-jae
bio: A divorced father and gambling addict who enters the games to pay off his debts. He wins the competition but is left traumatised by the loss of his friends.

name: Park Hae-soo
bio: Gi-hun's childhood friend and a brilliant investment team leader. He is pragmatic and willing to make ruthless decisions to survive.

name: Wi Ha-jun
bio: A determined police officer who infiltrates the games disguised as a guard to find his missing brother. He uncovers the dark secrets of the organisation.

name: HoYeon Jung
bio: A North Korean defector who enters the games to secure money for her family. She is stoic, observant, and forms a close bond with Gi-hun.

name: Oh Young-su
bio: An elderly man with a brain tumour who appears frail but is surprisingly resilient. He is revealed to be the host and creator of the games.
